cta.title: Ready to Get Started?

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Get answers to commonly asked questions

items.question: What are Tokens? How is usage calculated?
items.answer: Tokens are the basic units that large language models use to process text. Generally, 1 Chinese character equals about 1.5-2 Tokens, and 1 English word equals about 1-2 Tokens. You can view your Token consumption in real-time on the usage dashboard.

items.question: How does the pay-as-you-go model work?
items.answer: Simply recharge your account with any amount, and we'll deduct from your balance based on actual usage. No monthly subscriptions, no minimum commitments - you only pay for what you use.

items.question: What payment methods are supported?
items.answer: We support Bank Card (Visa, Mastercard, etc.), Alipay, and WeChat Pay. Enterprise customers can also request invoice-based billing.

items.question: Do recharge credits expire?
items.answer: No, your credits never expire. You can use them at your own pace without any time pressure.

items.question: Can I get a refund?
items.answer: Yes, unused credits can be refunded within 30 days of purchase. Please contact our support team for assistance.

items.question: How do I choose between different models?
items.answer: Each model has different strengths. GPT-4o and Claude 3.5 are best for complex reasoning, while lighter models like GPT-4o-mini are more cost-effective for simpler tasks. Our smart routing feature can automatically select the optimal model for your use case.
